---
title: "Publications"
description: "Peer-reviewed and trade publications."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
toc-location: right
---

## Peer-reviewed

Russell, B. R. (forthcoming, 2026). *Beyond access: Reimagining air mobility, basing, and endurance in the Indo-Pacific theater.* **Joint Force Quarterly**, 121.

Russell, B. R. (2023). *The United States Air Force pilot diversity dilemma.* **Equality, Diversity and Inclusion: An International Journal**, 42(7), 848–871. <https://doi.org/10.1108/edi-10-2022-0297>

## Trade

Russell, B. R. (2025, Spring). *Building a password cracker using OpenAI and Rust.* **2600: The Hacker Quarterly**.

## Self-published

Russell, B. R. (2023). *From wrenches to pens.*

Russell, B. R. (2022). *The other airman.*

## Doctoral dissertation

Russell, B. R. (2022). *Recommendations for improving applicant diversity recruitment at the United States Air Force Aim High Flight Academy.* Doctor of Education in Educational Leadership, Liberty University, Lynchburg, VA.
